creator: doeringu@escapebox.net
text:
Hi there, we at EscapeBox have recently changed our business focus from server hosting to IT consulting. Therefore, our entry on the commercial vendors pages requires an update: 1. Please remove the entry for "EscapeBox" from the "Internet Service Providers" page. We no longer offer any ISP services. 2. Then please add our new entry (see below) to the "Consulting" page, region "Europe". Here's the new entry, already formatted for the target page: ------------------ cut here -----------------
EscapeBox
More than 20 years of IT experience on demand! The EscapeBox Germany GmbH, founded in 2002, is a small but agile company that offers IT consulting services. We can support our clients both from the remote and on location, as desired. So, if you are looking for capable freelancers for your projects please do not hesitate to contact us today!
------------------ cut here ----------------- Thanks in advance and best regards, Uwe
